system: B2_4h forward observation — phase-1 zero-cost simulated accounting

signal.aggregation_boundary: UTC (4h buckets at 00/04/08/12/16/20 UTC; fill at bucket close)
signal.exit: signal_reversal only (no stop / no target / no filter)

sizing.model: single-position per symbol (flat -> long/short, flip on signal change)

costs.entry_exit_fill: signal-bar close +/- 1 tick, taker both sides (adverse tick)
costs.funding: real OKX funding, 8h settlement (00/08/16 UTC), settle px = 1m close before settlement

data.source_klines: OKX mainnet public REST /api/v5/market/candles + /api/v5/market/history-candles (bar=1m, confirm==1 only)
data.auth: none (public market data only; no API key, no signing, no account access)
data.store: forward/data/ (CSV, independent of .vntrader/database_mainnet.db which stays read-only)
data.seed: forward store seeded ONCE from database_mainnet.db (read-only copy) so EMA20/100 carry full history; thereafter REST-appended

forward_start_note: trades with entry_time >= forward_start_utc count as the independent forward sample. This is the first complete 4h bar close after VPS deployment (2026-06-21T05:30Z). DB 1m ends 2026-05-28 15:59Z; REST fills warmup gap but warmup bars are excluded from forward ledger by deploy.json first_live_bar_close_utc guard. <!-- 2026-06-22 修正：原 2026-06-01 锚点在部署前20天，导致 REST 回填历史冒充前向（见 forward_provenance_check_20260622/）；现改为部署后首个完整 bar -->
engine: research_trend_baseline(tb) + research_trend_validation_r2(r2) imported VERBATIM, zero modification; forward accounting is a thin outer wrapper calling tb.signal_emax/positions_flip/build_trades + r2.m2m_pnl
freeze_note: ALL params permanently frozen; any change = a NEW system (new SHA256). B2_4h is the optimal form: 4 enhancement attempts (funding-confirm, ADX>25 filter, faster-entry EMA10/30, V1 top5%-removal) all dual-sample killed. Forward deploys B2_4h AS-IS: zero optimization, zero filter, zero parameter variant.
